name: hermes-desktop
description: 一键部署 Hermes Agent + Open WebUI 的桌面应用
author: Jingyun Studio

scripts.package:win: pnpm --filter @hermes-desktop/shared-types build && pnpm --filter desktop-shell build && pnpm encrypt-env && pnpm --filter desktop-shell exec electron-builder --config ../../build/electron-builder.yml --win
scripts.package:win:offline: pnpm run prepare:offline-images && pnpm --filter @hermes-desktop/shared-types build && pnpm --filter desktop-shell build && pnpm encrypt-env && pnpm --filter desktop-shell exec electron-builder --config ../../build/electron-builder.offline.yml --win
